column2: CY 2026 projected total average Medicare FFS allowed amount*

column1: *This amount is based on 2024 Medicare FFS cost and utilization data of provider specialties in an office setting and the Office of the Actuary's (OACT's) projections of cost changes between 2024 to 2026. This amount represents the CY 2026 projected total average Medicare FFS allowed amount per primary care visit (excluding drug costs), weighted by utilization of the following provider specialty types: family practice, general practice, internal medicine, and geriatric medicine. The OACT employed generally accepted actuarial principles and practices in calculating this projected amount (per § 422.100(f)(7)).
